title: Dishmatic Scrubee, Interchangeable Washing Up Handle, Easy Grip Handle, Effective In Cleaning BBQ & Grills
features: Interchangeable Head: After time, the scourer head will need to be replaced, simply click and slide off the head to replace with a new refill
Designed for Comfort: The Dishmatic Scrubee handle is ergonomically designed for good grip and easy use so you can wash up efficiently and save time
Protect Your Hands: Dishmatic’s easy-to-use handle means you can wash for longer, keeping your hands out of the water and preventing wrinkled and dry hands
Tackle Tough Areas: With a long-lasting knitted mesh scrubbing head, the Scrubbee is highly effective at removing burnt-on stains from BBQ’s, steel pots, and oven trays
Made in the UK: Dishmatic is the world’s No 1 provider of the refillable washing up handle where all our products are manufactured and assembled in the UK
